ground_truth.description: Player respawns in a new location, indicated by a bright green and yellow circular teleportation effect. The player's health is reset to 50% and armor to 0%, and they are holding a shotgun.

gemini_response.description: Player respawns in a new location, indicated by a bright green and yellow circular teleportation effect. The player's health is reset to 50% and armor to 0%, and they are holding a shotgun.
